_comment: Chainbase airdrop claimable amounts per wallet. Amounts in C (18 decimals). Update when the user claims or when a new airdrop project is added. The merkle proof + amount are off-chain; this file is the single source of truth that the gsheet can read.
_source: https://stake.chainbase.com/ — values taken from the user's pending claimRewards(uint256,uint256,bytes32[]) calldata
